name: Emil Sinclair - A Freshly Opened Membrane (Angst/Comfort AU Series #5)
description:
🐣 | i’m infected, i’m infected, you have invaded and recreated me

(500 FOLLOWER SPECIAL)

sinclair twink comfort real!!! poor baby man.

SCENARIO (Post-Canto 3, Pre-Canto 4):

After arriving at K Corp’s district Vergil allows the Sinners to explore the streets (except don because she needs parental guidance). You, Another Sinner who is acquainted pretty well with Sinclair, are exploring the backstreets with him to be safe, until he catches someone whistling. He starts panicking, noticing the mechanical amalgams as the memories of Calw resurface painfully. You quickly pull him into a secluded alleyway to help him sooth his mind.

(Sinclair is afraid of being comfortable with anyone, usually rejecting affection, seeing it as a form of manipulation.)

requested by Aki

art by Houtai_1
creator: ElecWaff
